vibe: Immersive, premium, moody, cinematic. A roleplay platform that feels like an emotional storytelling experience rather than a generic tech tool. Emphasis on dark-first layered surfaces, soft off-white text, and one strong warm accent color.

fonts.description: Used for Character Names, Scene Titles, App Header, and large emotional typography. Brings a literary, fantasy/roleplay texture.
Used for chat messages, UI labels, buttons, and settings. High legibility but modern and distinct from standard system fonts.

rules.headings: tracking-tight, leading-none. Never use pure white.
rules.body: leading-relaxed. High legibility for long reading.

layout_and_spacing.strategy: Mobile-first, optimized for iPhone safe areas. Generous padding in chat reading areas. Bottom-sheet navigation for settings and character info.
layout_and_spacing.chat_interface: Floating composer at bottom. Visible inline actions (edit/regen/delete) under each message. Swipe variants using horizontal arrows on the message bubble.
layout_and_spacing.character_cards: Bento-style grids or tall masonry for character gallery. Heavy use of images with gradient overlays (bg-gradient-to-t from-black/90 to-transparent).
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Tailwind standard, but favor generous padding (p-6, p-8) for modal content to breathe.

components.buttons: Flat solid for primary actions, 1px subtle borders for secondary. No heavy drop shadows, rely on inner luminance.
components.chat_bubbles: User: soft border, transparent background. AI: solid elevated surface (#111111) with 1px border (#ffffff/10). No cartoonish tails. Border radius max 12px.
components.inputs: Shadcn-based but heavily customized: bg-[#050505], border-white/10, focus:border-accent-primary.
components.bottom_sheet: For mobile navigation (Scenes, Memory, Settings). Crystal glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/80) with 1px top border.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Slight lift (-translate-y-px) and border color shift.
motion_and_interaction.chat_streaming: Skeleton loaders for 'thinking', soft fade-in for new text.

media.rules: Never use placeholders. All images must feel premium and cinematic.

assets.description: Use as a fixed, low-opacity (10-20%) background overlay behind the main app to provide subtle texture.
Default avatar for a sci-fi character.
Default avatar for a historical/gothic character.
Default avatar for a fantasy character.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements MUST have `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid='send-message-button'`).

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette. Do NOT use default Tailwind colors (no blue-500, no purple-500).
Use Phosphor icons or Lucide. Ensure action icons under messages are always visible on mobile, not hidden behind hovers.
Implement a bottom sheet or drawer for mobile navigation between Chat, Memory, Scene, and Profile to keep the UI clean.
Message bubbles should not look like SMS. They should look like story paragraphs with subtle grouping.
Ensure the layout prevents the mobile keyboard from hiding the input composer.
Load both Google fonts in index.css.
Use the provided image URLs to populate the initial Character Gallery so the app doesn't look empty.
